seoTitle: La Perouse vs Lade Vale — Climate Risk Comparison | ClimateNest
seoDescription: Compare climate risk scores between La Perouse and Lade Vale. See which suburb is safer from flood, bushfire, heat, and storm hazards.
ogTitle: La Perouse vs Lade Vale: Climate Safety
ogDescription: Data-driven comparison of climate risk in La Perouse and Lade Vale.
heading: La Perouse vs Lade Vale — Which is Safer?
intro: Compare climate risk between La Perouse, New South Wales and Lade Vale, New South Wales. Our analysis uses data from BOM, CSIRO, and state hazard authorities to score each suburb across 6 climate hazards.
verdict: Lade Vale has a lower overall climate risk score (36/100) compared to La Perouse (43/100). We recommend getting an address-level report for properties in both suburbs before making a purchase decision.

faq.question: Is La Perouse or Lade Vale safer from flooding?
faq.answer: La Perouse has a flood risk score of 24/100, while Lade Vale scores 43/100. A lower score indicates lower flood risk. Get an address-level flood risk report for a specific property.

faq.question: Which suburb has lower bushfire risk?
faq.answer: La Perouse scores 64/100 for bushfire risk. Lade Vale scores 25/100. Fire risk depends on proximity to vegetation and local fire history.

faq.question: Should I buy in La Perouse or Lade Vale?
faq.answer: Both suburbs have climate considerations. Lade Vale has a lower overall climate risk score. We recommend getting a full ClimateNest report for any specific property you're considering, which includes 8 hazard scores, insurance projections, and actionable recommendations.

valueImpact.description: Properties in this area may face a 2% climate value drag over time due to rising insurance costs and climate adaptation expenses.
